ol.li: Physical Isolation: CPU cannot dereference devPtr directly (Segmentation Fault).
GPU Constraints: Standard kernels cannot access hostPtr without Unified Memory/Pinned memory.
Synchronization: cudaMemcpy is a blocking operation on the Host thread.
Paging: Transfers require "Pinned" (Page-Locked) memory for maximum PCIe performance.

ul.li: Solid Orange/Green: High-speed internal memory buses.
